calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Petitioner: Muyi Chen, present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the Minor: Xianru Chen, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Jinzhou Hu, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the Name Change of a Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Kenneth Xianru Hu.
Decree signed in open court.
